empty.title: No invitations
empty.description: No invitation found for the selected filters

answer.descriptionAccept: You're about to accept {username}'s invitation which means they will be able to access the team workspace. | You're about to accept the selected invitations which means the users will be able to access the team workspace.
answer.descriptionReject: You're about to reject {username}'s invitation which means they will not be able to access the team workspace. | You're about to reject the selected invitations which means the users will not be able to access the team workspace.

create.title: Creating an invitation
create.description: Create an invitation for a given bot and a given user.
